targetId.description: UUID of the item being watched.

type.description: Channel type. webhook: HTTP POST. mcp: active MCP session. reactive: reactive UI component.

url.description: Required for webhook. Use $VAR for secrets.

secret.description: Optional HMAC secret for webhook signature verification.

events.description: Which events trigger notification. At least one required.

principal.description: Identity string of who registered this subscription. Used for audit and notification routing.
